text: Kil' ekyo twagw' omu tangaalo waitu inywe.
Abakazi mwenda bona bagw' omu bitangaalo.
Ati, "Mwaana wa maawe, muchwezi gw' omwaitu
Nyinento Mugasha, maawe, yasabal' omu maizi.
Ogw' ati, "Komuzaile, olwo yagw' omu nyanja,
Yabah' eichumu ly' omulinga elya Kagolo.
Wamala ati, "Inyw' abakazi mwend' okwo muli aha
Ati, "Aluge' omukazi emanzi achumite Mugasha amwite
Kil' ekyo ababaile bali 'ho bahi, "Nyambubi nosing' omushango
Yashub' omu nyanj' empango nka Lweru Njwenge.
Yamalayo ebilo bina na bina munana.
Yezinga Kishanje kya Kalasha omwa Mutailenge.
Lubafu omu ga Nyamataba aha munwa gwa Kanyabagwa.
Omwaana akashangwa yaihya obunyasi ebiganda munana.
Kil' ekyo Mugasha akab' ashumikile ebeebo y' obukanda.
Ninkanyiame n' omwaana wa maawe Kagolo,
"Mugye, nzitul' omu kibuga ky' omukama welata,
Kil' ekyo bagenda bagitagalula, waitu, Bafa Bagambiilwe
Nkugambilege: Abashaija ba Mugasha babanza kuhulula.
Ahi, "Mbwenu twakuganywa aha lubango lwa Ndekezi."
Ndagw' ebilo bina na bina munana Kyamutwala,
Kil' ekyo, kazilo, akaimuka yegambisilize Nzige
Ekigabilo ky'obon' aha nyumanju omwa Luyongo lwa Nyante,
Bahi, "Katulayendaga omwa Luyongo lwa Nyante, Mugasha,
Aho kil' ekyo, waitu, katwabaile tuliwo
Mukwaat' ebyokutaha amagenyi bwe Wamala, welata.
Bahisi, "Omwisiki w' omuholo omutahi w' amagenyi?"
Mala waitu kayagiile kuleb' omu ibanga,
Mbwenu waitu aho Wamala yabanza kugilaki?
Nkolongo eichumu lyoyaizile ataile aibega kutaha amagenyi,
Omukaikulu owolukinga akaba ali kasolobana ekihumpi.
Omukaikulu ogwo akaba ali kasoloban' ekihumpi,
Mala n' ekihumpi eila kyagiilag' omunwa nk' enfulu ezindi.
Mbwenu mbali yaikaile kuteteelela ebigamb' ebyo,
Abakazi b' empundu bakaba bali mamba.
Eil' emamba zayelaga teiteite nk' emyendo.
Enju bakaba bashuntamile omuli "Tumuombe kuleba nkabulakya akalaalamu bukakya."
Omwisiki w' omuholo akaba ali Nshonzi.
Bamulagaza bamutaho amajuta kushaag' omugole kandi alikushweelwa.
Ati, "Tinakusiigila mujubi w' omwa Ishulaine Bugunda nye.
Muhulila mbakigamba bati, "Bunanka gwatema kyonka bunanka gwatema muno.
Mbwenu kil' ekyo taliho muyaga kugya omu batani.
Omu bataani gukagyayo gwalabaalabamu mpola mpola.
Omwaana gw' engemu ogulikwiigan' echupa gukagwa.
Naiwe ijuka enkuba kuteela omwa mwaatani wawe okwo wakushana.
Enkuba Wamala ekateel' omu ilembo, yateel' enyumanju.
Naiwe ijuka eibale limo lyenjula kulikwaata.

Omwaana kabamulesile omu isikilo ly' ekitalo,
Enjubu kayamulebile eti, "Ogu tiwe twaboine lushungu ogu!"
Enjubu kayalotokile eti, "Ha! ha! ha! hu! hu!"
Yamumazaamu ebilo bina na bina munana.

Ali Buganda bwa Ntege na Kihimbo.
Ndi Buganda bwa Ntege na Kihimbo.
Ati, "Olebe n' ebintu ebyo yasigil' aha Mugasha,
Mala kayakigambile Wamala napima nti kwakweli:
Nabagy' omu mahanga bakagoba Indian Ocean bagila bati enyanja etula aitaka lwona.
Ahi, "Mwaana wange eitaka nilyo lingi enyanja nke kyonka aka..."
Ahi, "Omwaana wa maawe tiyakushweelwa mujubi omwa Ishulaine Bugunda."

Egi yona eli nyanja kugoba nka Itahwa.
Ndi Buganda bwa Ntege na Kihimbo.
Ati, "Ti ti ti ti ti ti."
